offer: For restaurant inventory managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, food cost variances cause budget overruns. We monitor food cost variances and flag anomalies instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Food cost variances leading to budget overruns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant inventory managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for restaurant managers
try_it: Let users try Anomaly detection alerts and Variance reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
